docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED-GRANTED.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-15-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-21-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DEPT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUFTEL, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXWORTHY, JON $360.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $360.00, THE COURT ORDERS RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS STATURY PENALTIES FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IN THE SUM OF $300.00; HOWEVER THE COURT ALLOWS AS EQUITABLE OFFSET OF $240.00 FOR PRO-RATED RENT FOR THE PERIOD JANUARY 1, 2007 THROUGH 12, 2007.
